abilities.name: Latch On
abilities.text: Enemy models in base contact with this model suffer -1 DF.

abilities.name: Through the Muck
abilities.text: If this model ends its activation within 2" of a piece of terrain or Lamp marker, it heals 1.

abilities.name: Trail of Slime
abilities.text: The area within 2" of this model is hazardous terrain. Friendly models may choose to be unaffected by this terrain.

actions.name: Sludge Strike
actions.costs_and_restrictions: When this action is declared, choose if it has a range of (melee)2" or (gun)8". If the target is in base contact with this model, this action receives a (c).

triggers.name: Slurping Maw
triggers.text: Once per activation. Declare this action again, drawing range and LoS from a model with a friendly Consumed upgrade.

triggers.name: Burst of Speed
triggers.text: Move this model up to 5", ignoring other models. Enemy models moved through this way are dealt 1 damage.

triggers.name: Acidic Touch
triggers.text: Remove a friendly token from this model. When resolving, damage from this action is irreducible.

actions.name: Ingested
actions.costs_and_restrictions: Place this model in base contact with the target. Then, attach the Consumed upgrade to the target.

triggers.name: Last Light
triggers.text: This model gains a Death token.

triggers.name: Horrible Filling
triggers.text: The target is dealt 1 irreducible damage.

actions.name: Rapid Digestion
actions.costs_and_restrictions: Remove target Remains or Lamp marker. This model heals 2. If this action removed a Lamp marker, this model gains a Life token.
